role_growth.title: Role Growth Index (Last 30 Days vs Prior Period)
role_growth.insight: 'Data Platform Engineer' shows the highest recent hiring surge at +35% vs baseline.

skill_salary_premium.title: Top Skills by Salary Premium vs Market Median
skill_salary_premium.insight: Skills like 'Weaviate' and 'Pinecone' carry the highest salary premiums, averaging 72% above market.

remote_trend.title: Remote Work Share Over Time (%)
remote_trend.insight: Remote work availability has decreased by 21.3pp over the observed period, from 66.7% to 45.4%.

salary_by_tier.title: Median Salary by Company Tier
salary_by_tier.insight: 'FAANG+' companies offer the highest median compensation at $225,000, vs $145,000 at 'Startup'.

top_skills.title: Top 25 In-Demand Skills (All Roles)
top_skills.insight: 'Python', 'Sql', and 'Git' appear in the most job postings, confirming their status as baseline requirements.

skills_by_role.title: Top Skills by Role Category
skills_by_role.insight: Each role has a distinct skill fingerprint — LLM skills dominate AI Engineer roles while SQL/dbt lead Analytics Engineering.

salary_seniority.title: Salary Distribution by Seniority Level
salary_seniority.insight: Compensation scales 2.7x from Entry Level ($115,000) to Principal ($310,000).

remote_salary_gap.title: Remote vs On-site Salary Gap by Role
remote_salary_gap.insight: Remote roles carry a 1.4% salary penalty vs on-site ($177,500 vs $180,000 median).

salary_range_width.title: Salary Range Width by Role (P10–P90)
salary_range_width.insight: 'Machine Learning Engineer' has the widest salary range ($260,000 P10→P90 spread), indicating high variance in comp negotiation.

llm_cooccurrence.title: Skills Most Paired with AI/LLM Technologies
llm_cooccurrence.insight: 'Python' is the skill most commonly paired with LLM/AI requirements, appearing in 76% of AI-focused job postings.

hiring_velocity.title: Weekly Hiring Velocity by Role
hiring_velocity.insight: Overall hiring is accelerating — avg WoW change of +21.6% over the last 4 weeks.

location_salary.title: Median Salary by Location
location_salary.insight: 'San Francisco, CA' leads with $205,000 median salary across 391 postings.
